title: About Étoile
intro: A neighborhood studio with a professional standard.

content.p: Étoile Ballet Studio opened in 2004 in a single rented room with eight students and one barre. Twenty years later we train more than three hundred dancers a year across four disciplines — but the founding idea has never changed: rigorous classical technique taught with warmth.
We believe dance belongs to everyone. Our doors are open to the three-year-old in her first pair of slippers and to the adult returning to the barre after decades away.

ul: Technique first — clean fundamentals before tricks.
Small classes so every dancer is seen and corrected.
Music and artistry taught alongside steps.
Performance experience on a real, professional stage.
Financial aid so cost is never the reason a child stops dancing.
Faculty who are working, credentialed professionals.
A studio that is kind, punctual, and drama-free.
Respect for each dancer's own pace and goals.
An alumni network that stays connected for life.
Open communication with families every term.
A welcome for dancers of every background.
Joy — because dancers who love it, stay.
Community events beyond the studio walls.
